anullsrc=cl=stereo:r=44100,atrim=duration=0.500[run1_p0];anullsrc=cl=stereo:r=44100,atrim=duration=0.500[run1_p1];[0:a][1:a][run1_p0][2:a][run1_p1][3:a]concat=n=6:v=0:a=1[run1_speech];[run1_speech]asplit=2[run1_speech_mix][run1_speech_duck];[4:a]silenceremove=start_periods=1:start_threshold=-50dB,areverse,silenceremove=start_periods=1:start_threshold=-50dB,areverse[run1_se0_st];[run1_se0_st]volume=0.80,adelay=5500|5500[run1_se0];[run1_speech_mix][run1_se0]amix=inputs=2:duration=first:normalize=0[run1_after_se0];[5:a]volume=0.30,atrim=duration=5.000[run1_bgm0_trim];[run1_bgm0_trim]afade=t=in:d=1.000[run1_bgm0_fi];[run1_bgm0_fi]areverse,afade=t=in:d=1.000,areverse[run1_bgm0_fo];[run1_bgm0_fo]adelay=4000|4000[run1_bgm0_raw];[run1_bgm0_raw][run1_speech_duck]sidechaincompress=threshold=0.02:ratio=4.0[run1_bgm_ducked];[run1_after_se0][run1_bgm_ducked]amix=inputs=2:duration=first:normalize=0[run1_after_bgm];[6:a]silenceremove=start_periods=1:start_threshold=-50dB,areverse,silenceremove=start_periods=1:start_threshold=-50dB,areverse[jingle6_st];[jingle6_st]afade=t=in:d=0.300[jingle6_fi];[7:a]silenceremove=start_periods=1:start_threshold=-50dB,areverse,silenceremove=start_periods=1:start_threshold=-50dB,areverse[jingle7_st];[jingle7_st]areverse,afade=t=in:d=1.000,areverse[jingle7_fo];anullsrc=cl=stereo:r=44100,atrim=duration=0.500[pause_concat1];anullsrc=cl=stereo:r=44100,atrim=duration=0.500[pause_concat3];[jingle6_fi][pause_concat1][run1_after_bgm][pause_concat3][jingle7_fo]concat=n=5:v=0:a=1[full_concat];[full_concat]loudnorm=I=-16:TP=-1.5:LRA=11[norm_out];[norm_out]alimiter=limit=0.841:level=0[out]
